hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; if command -v py >/dev/null 2>&1; then py -3 scripts/export_session_notes.py 2>/dev/null; else python3 scripts/export_session_notes.py 2>/dev/null; fi; git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; dirty=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); ahead=$(git rev-list --count @{u}..HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ -n "$dirty" ] || [ "${ahead:-0}" -gt 0 ]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "Session notes auto-exported to docs/session-notes/ (curated summaries go in docs/SESSION_NOTES.md). Commit & push so other machines pick them up (git pull --rebase first if push is rejected)."}'; fi
